sentences.translation: Javna biblioteka organizovala je izložbu knjiga.
sentences.translationEn: The public library held a book exhibition.

sentences.arabic: عَرَضَتِ الْمَكْتَبَةُ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ مِئَةِ كِتَابٍ جَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Biblioteka je izložila više od sto novih knjiga.
sentences.translationEn: The library displayed more than one hundred new books.

sentences.translation: Poznati pisac govorio je pred posjetiocima.
sentences.translationEn: A famous author spoke in front of the visitors.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الزُّوَّارِ كُتُبًا وَذَهَبُوا سُعَدَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi posjetioci kupili su knjige i otišli sretni.
sentences.translationEn: Many visitors bought books and left happy.
